label: Prairie Band Potawatomi and Forced Removals

comments.text: A Wendat wampum belt of peace and friendship from c.1600, which the Wendat carried for hundreds of years, including during their removal from the Great Lakes to Kansas in the 1840s.

These fucking people know nothing about native Americans. My wife, my kids, and my grandkids are members of the CPN, Citizens Band Potawatomi. They were forced from their lands in the Great Lakes and move to Oklahoma. And surprise, surprise, they look like fucking white guys like me!
The Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation that was uprooted from the Great Lakes region in the 1830s is facing widespread outrage over plans to profit from another forced removal.
